'''鈭歝h-p-v''' ('''chapava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lollygag|lollygag]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-p-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lollygag|lollygag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-p-v
|-
! Lemma
| chapava
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chapavithi|chapavithi]] || [[word:chapaviji|chapaviji]] || [[word:chapavishi|chapavishi]] || [[word:chapavi|chapavi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chapavuthuth|chapavuthuth]] || [[word:chapavujuj|chapavujuj]] || [[word:chapavushush|chapavushush]] || [[word:chapav|chapav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chapavuthu|chapavuthu]] || [[word:chapavuju|chapavuju]] || [[word:chapavushu|chapavushu]] || [[word:chapavu|chapavu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chapavufuth|chapavufuth]] || [[word:chapavufuj|chapavufuj]] || [[word:chapavufush|chapavufush]] || [[word:chapavuf|chapavuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chapavethe|chapavethe]] || [[word:chapaveje|chapaveje]] || [[word:chapaveshe|chapaveshe]] || [[word:chapave|chapave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chapavothoth|chapavothoth]] || [[word:chapavojoj|chapavojoj]] || [[word:chapavoshosh|chapavoshosh]] || [[word:chapav|chapav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chapavotho|chapavotho]] || [[word:chapavojo|chapavojo]] || [[word:chapavosho|chapavosho]] || [[word:chapavo|chapavo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chapavofoth|chapavofoth]] || [[word:chapavofoj|chapavofoj]] || [[word:chapavofosh|chapavofosh]] || [[word:chapavof|chapavof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chapav忙th忙|chapav忙th忙]] || [[word:chapav忙j忙|chapav忙j忙]] || [[word:chapav忙sh忙|chapav忙sh忙]] || [[word:chapav忙|chapav忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chapavathath|chapavathath]] || [[word:chapavajaj|chapavajaj]] || [[word:chapavashash|chapavashash]] || [[word:chapav|chapav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chapavatha|chapavatha]] || [[word:chapavaja|chapavaja]] || [[word:chapavasha|chapavasha]] || [[word:chapava|chapava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chapavafath|chapavafath]] || [[word:chapavafaj|chapavafaj]] || [[word:chapavafash|chapavafash]] || [[word:chapavaf|chapavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:chapavasha|chapavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gochapavasha|gochapavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokichapavasha|gokichapavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:chapavn眉sha|chapavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gochapavnkn眉sha|gochapavnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokichapavn眉sha|gokichapavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chapavsh毛sha|chapavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochapavnksh毛sha|gochapavnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichapavsh毛sha|gokichapavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chapavrosha|chapavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochapavnkrosha|gochapavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichapavrosha|gokichapavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chapavmusha|chapavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochapavnkmusha|gochapavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichapavmusha|gokichapavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:chapavsherasha|chapavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gochapavnksherasha|gochapavnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokichapavsherasha|gokichapavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:chapavngasha|chapavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gochapavnkngasha|gochapavnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokichapavngasha|gokichapavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chapavyasha|chapavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochapavnkyasha|gochapavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokichapavyasha|gokichapavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:chapavyamasha|chapavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gochapavnkyamasha|gochapavnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokichapavyamasha|gokichapavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:chapavn眉sh毛sha|chapavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochapavnkn眉sh毛sha|gochapavnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichapavn眉sh毛sha|gokichapavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chapavn眉rosha|chapavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochapavnkn眉rosha|gochapavnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichapavn眉rosha|gokichapavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chapavn眉musha|chapavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochapavnkn眉musha|gochapavnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichapavn眉musha|gokichapavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:chapavsh毛n眉sha|chapavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochapavnksh毛n眉sha|gochapavnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichapavsh毛n眉sha|gokichapavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chapavsh毛rosha|chapavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochapavnksh毛rosha|gochapavnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichapavsh毛rosha|gokichapavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chapavsh毛musha|chapavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochapavnksh毛musha|gochapavnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichapavsh毛musha|gokichapavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:chapavron眉sha|chapavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochapavnkron眉sha|gochapavnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichapavron眉sha|gokichapavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:chapavrosh毛sha|chapavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochapavnkrosh毛sha|gochapavnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichapavrosh毛sha|gokichapavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chapavromusha|chapavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochapavnkromusha|gochapavnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichapavromusha|gokichapavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:chapavmun眉sha|chapavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochapavnkmun眉sha|gochapavnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichapavmun眉sha|gokichapavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:chapavmush毛sha|chapavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochapavnkmush毛sha|gochapavnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichapavmush毛sha|gokichapavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chapavmurosha|chapavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochapavnkmurosha|gochapavnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichapavmurosha|gokichapavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:chapav|chapav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ch忙p忙v|ch忙p忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hochapav|hochapav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoch忙p忙v|hoch忙p忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohochapav|hohochapav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoch忙p忙v|hohoch忙p忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉chapav|n眉chapav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ch忙p忙v|n眉ch忙p忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉chapav|n眉n眉chapav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ch忙p忙v|n眉n眉ch忙p忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂chapav|n茂chapav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ch忙p忙v|n茂ch忙p忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂chapav|n茂n茂chapav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ch忙p忙v|n茂n茂ch忙p忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luchapav|luchapav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luch忙p忙v|luch忙p忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluchapav|luluchapav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluch忙p忙v|luluch忙p忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lichapav|lichapav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lich忙p忙v|lich忙p忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilichapav|lilichapav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilich忙p忙v|lilich忙p忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kochapav|kochapav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koch忙p忙v|koch忙p忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokochapav|kokochapav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoch忙p忙v|kokoch忙p忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kechapav|kechapav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kech忙p忙v|kech忙p忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekechapav|kekechapav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekech忙p忙v|kekech忙p忙v]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
